arts-literature-starter.opentdb.bf681f54.prompt: Which Shakespeare tragedy centers on a Scottish noble whose ambition is encouraged by three witches?
arts-literature-starter.opentdb.bf681f54.explanation: Macbeth follows a Scottish noble who murders his way to the throne after hearing the witches' prophecy.
arts-literature-starter.opentdb.bf681f54.details: The tragedy explores ambition, guilt, fate, and political violence as Macbeth and Lady Macbeth try to hold power after killing King Duncan.

film-television-starter.opentdb.2babdf87.prompt: Which late-night programming block originally premiered the animated series Rick and Morty?
film-television-starter.opentdb.2babdf87.explanation: Rick and Morty premiered as part of Adult Swim, Cartoon Network's adult-oriented programming block.
film-television-starter.opentdb.2babdf87.details: The series follows reckless scientist Rick Sanchez and his anxious grandson Morty on dimension-spanning adventures.

music-starter.opentdb.f8b49551f4084d46.prompt: Which South Korean performer recorded the worldwide hit Gangnam Style?
music-starter.opentdb.f8b49551f4084d46.explanation: South Korean rapper and singer Psy recorded Gangnam Style.
music-starter.opentdb.f8b49551f4084d46.details: The song's satirical lyrics, distinctive horse-riding dance, and humorous video made it a global viral phenomenon.

music-starter.opentdb.faf5b4692be3eedb.prompt: Which experimental hip-hop group released the album Year of the Snitch?
music-starter.opentdb.faf5b4692be3eedb.explanation: Year of the Snitch is the sixth studio album by Death Grips.
music-starter.opentdb.faf5b4692be3eedb.details: The group is known for combining abrasive electronics, punk intensity, and unconventional hip-hop production.

music-starter.opentdb.59ec11a6b0fa512c.prompt: Which thrash-metal band released the album Peace Sells... but Who's Buying?
music-starter.opentdb.59ec11a6b0fa512c.explanation: Megadeth released Peace Sells... but Who's Buying? as its second studio album.
music-starter.opentdb.59ec11a6b0fa512c.details: Its complex guitar work and politically skeptical lyrics helped establish the sound of American thrash metal.

music-starter.opentdb.92db457dcb0b5b80.prompt: Which English singer recorded the hit Never Gonna Give You Up?
music-starter.opentdb.92db457dcb0b5b80.explanation: Rick Astley recorded Never Gonna Give You Up.
music-starter.opentdb.92db457dcb0b5b80.details: The Stock Aitken Waterman production topped charts internationally and later became the basis of the internet prank known as rickrolling.

sound-and-song.opentdb.fd9a16175e66f648.prompt: What is the title of Muse's debut studio album?
sound-and-song.opentdb.fd9a16175e66f648.explanation: Showbiz is the debut studio album by Muse.
sound-and-song.opentdb.fd9a16175e66f648.details: The album introduced the band's dramatic vocals and alternative-rock sound before later releases expanded into progressive and electronic styles.

sound-and-song.opentdb.ffbc87ad70422f36.prompt: What is the title of Tame Impala's second studio album?
sound-and-song.opentdb.ffbc87ad70422f36.explanation: Lonerism is Tame Impala's second studio album.
sound-and-song.opentdb.ffbc87ad70422f36.details: Kevin Parker recorded the psychedelic album largely alone, expanding the project's sound with prominent synthesizers.

sound-and-song.opentdb.9a6ba85410f63f49.prompt: What is the title of Hollywood Undead's third studio album?
sound-and-song.opentdb.9a6ba85410f63f49.explanation: Notes from the Underground is Hollywood Undead's third studio album.
sound-and-song.opentdb.9a6ba85410f63f49.details: The record continued the group's mixture of rap and rock and became its highest-charting U.S. album at the time.
